The '''Tadrin family''' was a prominent family in the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Around a [[Standard century/Legends|century]] before the fall of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], [[Cassander Tadrin]] the head of the [[Esselian conglomerate]], which controlled twenty-four [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworlds]]. He later discovered the [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] that came to be known as the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]]. His many descendants continued to live in the region during the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. One member of the family was [[Luthus Tadrin]], who became [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of the [[Tadrin sector/Legends|Tadrin sector]] due to his Imperial sympathies.<ref name="Geonosis" />
